title: Linai's Sunny Beach Day
description: Linai drifts to the beach and discovers a beautiful crab and a stunning sand castle.

acts.approachText: Linai floats lazily over the warm shoreline, her body glowing a soft golden hue as sunlight filters through her translucent form. She spots a magnificent crab perched on a sun-warmed rock — its shell shimmering with iridescent pinks and oranges like a tiny sunset. Linai slows immediately, her eyes widening softly with wonder. She drifts closer by degrees, her internal patterns simplifying into gentle swirls of admiration. The crab notices her and sidesteps cautiously, unsure what this glowing cloud creature wants. Linai pulses with warm light, trying to communicate that she means no harm and only wants to appreciate this beautiful creature — but she must find just the right approach so the crab feels safe and not startled.

choices.label: Glow softly and drift very slowly closer
choices.outcomeText: Linai dims her glow to the gentlest, warmest amber and drifts forward in tiny increments, her vapor trails settling into calm, unhurried wisps. The crab tilts its eyestalks curiously. Linai hovers just beside it, radiating quiet delight, her internal patterns blooming into tiny sparkles. The crab relaxes and raises one claw in what looks remarkably like a greeting. Linai's body expands with joy, rising slightly higher as though buoyancy itself has increased, and the two share a perfect, wordless sunny moment together on the rock.

choices.label: Surge forward excitedly to say hello
choices.outcomeText: Linai's excitement gets the better of her and she surges forward in a bright enthusiastic burst — her glow flaring, her trails streaming wildly behind her. The crab startles and scuttles sideways at impressive speed, disappearing behind the rock with a soft sandy skitter. Linai pulls up short, her body contracting sheepishly, both eyes angling outward toward the viewer with a flat 'you see this?' expression. She lets out a soft deflated hum, bobs once, and resets — drifting back to try a gentler approach.

acts.approachText: Floating further along the shoreline, still glowing warmly from her moment with the crab, Linai rounds a gentle curve of beach and stops completely. There before her stands an extraordinary sand castle — tall turrets, arched gateways, and delicate shell decorations pressed into every wall. It catches the afternoon light and glows like something from a dream. Linai's eyes widen and her body relaxes outward, her glow becoming cleaner and calmer as beauty settles over her. She drifts closer, attentive and hushed, her internal patterns simplifying into tiny gentle sparkles. She wants to appreciate every detail — but the castle is surrounded by a wide moat of shallow seawater, and a curious seagull has landed right on the tallest turret, eyeing Linai with suspicion. She must find a way to get close enough to truly admire the castle without disturbing either the moat or the seagull.

choices.label: Float high above the moat to peek at...
choices.outcomeText: Linai rises gracefully upward, her vapor trails gathering beneath her as she ascends in a smooth, unhurried arc over the moat. From above, the sand castle is even more breathtaking — every shell and pebble detail visible, the turrets casting tiny perfect shadows. The seagull on the top turret regards her for a moment, then puffs its feathers contentedly and closes its eyes. Linai hovers there, her body fully expanded with quiet awe, internal sparkles drifting outward like slow fireworks. She glows a deep, contented gold as the afternoon sun warms the whole scene. A perfect, complete, beautiful moment — earned and unhurried.

choices.label: Phase low through the moat to see the...
choices.outcomeText: Linai dips low and drifts into the shallow moat water, intending to glide through — but the water is saltier and denser than expected, and she absorbs it with a surprised shudder, her color shifting to a startled pale blue and her form wobbling like a soap bubble in wind. She bobs back upward, shedding little droplets of absorbed seawater that catch the light like tiny prisms. The seagull on the turret lets out one sharp, amused squawk. Linai hovers, slightly puffier than before, both eyes aimed directly at the viewer with a long, patient, waterlogged stare. She shakes herself gently, her color warming back to gold, and rises to try a drier approach.
